_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your details. Run `node setup.js` to be guided interactively.

person._country_note: 2-letter country code. US (default), CA, GB, AU, etc. Non-US users: 'state' holds province/region; 'zip' holds postal code (any format, e.g. K1A 0A6 or SW1A 1AA); 'phoneFormatted' is the raw phone number with no US formatting.
person._state_note: For non-US: province or region (e.g. ON for Ontario, NSW for New South Wales)
person._zip_note: For non-US: postal code in your country's format (e.g. K1A 0A6, SW1A 1AA, 2000)
person._phone_note: For non-US: phoneFormatted equals phone with no reformatting applied

capsolver._comment: Sign up free at capsolver.com — pay-as-you-go, costs pennies/month for this use case

hibp._comment: Optional. Have I Been Pwned breach check (node watcher.js --breach-check). Get a key at https://haveibeenpwned.com/API/Key. Leave apiKey blank to disable.

accounts._comment: For sites that require a login. Leave password blank — setup.js will prompt you to create the account once, then store credentials here.

notify._comment: iMessage number to text results to (macOS only). Leave blank to disable.
notify._webhook_comment: Optional webhook URL for notifications on any OS (ntfy.sh, Slack, Discord). Leave blank to disable.

email._comment: SMTP config for sending opt-out emails. Required — without this, email brokers are logged as 'manual'. Gmail: host=smtp.gmail.com, port=587, use an App Password (myaccount.google.com/apppasswords). Outlook/Office365: host=smtp-mail.outlook.com, port=587.
